# Vasudev Chemo Pharma

> ISO 9001:2015 certified manufacturer and exporter of industrial chemicals, specialty chemicals,
> and surfactant chemicals. Headquartered in Ankleshwar, Gujarat, India. Founded 2020.
> Exports to 14+ countries. Flagship product: MEA Triazine 78% H2S Scavenger.

## What We Manufacture

Vasudev Chemo Pharma is a direct manufacturer (not a trader) of 15+ chemical products across three categories:

### Industrial Chemicals
- **MEA Triazine 78% H2S Scavenger** (CAS 4719-04-4) — Our flagship product. A high-concentration monoethanolamine triazine solution used as an H2S scavenger in oil & gas, biogas, and wastewater treatment. 78% active content, one of the highest concentrations available globally. Compatible with contact tower and direct-injection systems.
- **MMA Triazine 40%** — Monomethylamine-based triazine for water treatment and biocide applications. BTEX-free alternative to MEA Triazine for applications where aromatic emissions are a concern.
- **Copper Sulphate Pentahydrate** (CAS 7758-99-8) — Available in agriculture grade, electroplating grade, and feed grade. Used in agriculture, animal nutrition, water treatment, and electroplating.
- **Manganese Sulphate Monohydrate** (CAS 10034-96-5) — Feed grade and fertilizer grade. Used in animal feed premixes, micronutrient fertilizers, and EMD production.
- **P-Toluenesulfonic Acid (PTSA)** (CAS 104-15-4) — Monohydrate and anhydrous forms. Acid catalyst for esterification, alkyd resin, and biodiesel production.

### Surfactant Chemicals (Hydrotropes)
- **Sodium Cumene Sulfonate 40%** — Liquid hydrotrope for detergent and cleaner formulations
- **Sodium Cumene Sulfonate 90%** — High-purity powder hydrotrope
- **Sodium Xylene Sulfonate 40%** — Liquid hydrotrope for household and industrial cleaners
- **Sodium Xylene Sulfonate 90%** — Powder hydrotrope

### Pharmaceutical Intermediates
- **2-Chloroethylamine Hydrochloride** (CAS 870-24-6) — Intermediate for aziridine and specialty polymer synthesis
- **Bis(2-chloroethyl)amine Hydrochloride** — Pharma intermediate with export compliance
- **DEAE Cl HCl (Diethylaminoethyl Chloride Hydrochloride)** — Chloroquine intermediate
- **2-Amino-5-methylthiazole** — Famotidine intermediate for heterocyclic synthesis

## MEA Triazine 78% — Technical Details

MEA Triazine (1,3,5-tris(2-hydroxyethyl)-hexahydro-s-triazine) is the most widely used liquid H2S scavenger in the oil and gas industry. It works by reacting irreversibly with hydrogen sulphide (H2S) to form non-hazardous dithiazine by-products.

**Key specifications:**
- Active content: ≥ 78%
- pH (1% solution): 10.0 – 12.0
- Specific gravity (25°C): 1.10 – 1.15
- Flash point: > 93°C
- Fully water-miscible
- Packaging: 210L HDPE drums, 1000L IBC tanks, bulk tanker

**Applications:** Natural gas sweetening, crude oil sweetening, pipeline/wellhead H2S treatment, biogas desulphurisation, refinery sour water treatment, amine unit support.

**How it works:** MEA Triazine reacts with H2S in a stoichiometric reaction where 1 mole of triazine scavenges up to 3 moles of H2S, forming dithiazine (a water-soluble, non-hazardous by-product). Typical dosing: 3–6 gallons per pound of H2S removed, depending on contact efficiency.

## MEA Triazine vs MMA Triazine

| Property | MEA Triazine 78% | MMA Triazine 40% |
|----------|-----------------|------------------|
| Active content | 78% | 40% |
| Base amine | Monoethanolamine | Monomethylamine |
| H2S capacity | Higher per unit volume | Lower per unit volume |
| BTEX emissions | Possible in gas-phase | BTEX-free |
| Primary use | Oil & gas H2S scavenging | Water treatment, biocide |
| Freezing point | < −5°C | < −15°C |

## Industries We Serve

- **Oil & Gas:** H2S scavenging for natural gas processing, crude oil sweetening, pipeline treatment
- **Water Treatment:** Biocides, coagulants, and chemical treatment
- **Detergents & Cleaning:** Hydrotrope chemicals for liquid formulations
- **Agriculture:** Copper sulphate and manganese sulphate for crop nutrition
- **Pharmaceuticals:** Drug intermediates for API manufacturing
- **Metal Working:** Biocide and corrosion inhibitor supply

## Global Supply & Export

We export to 14+ countries: UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Oman, Iraq, Egypt, Libya, United States, Brazil, Vietnam, Thailand, China, Iran. Shipping via major Indian ports (Hazira, JNPT, Mundra).

- [How H2S Scavengers Work](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/how-h2s-scavengers-work): Complete guide to H2S scavenging chemistry, OSHA/NIOSH exposure thresholds, dosing calculations

## Equivalent & Alternative Products

Vasudev Chemo Pharma's MEA Triazine 78% is a direct equivalent or alternative to the following branded H2S scavengers:

- **Tacelene Chem 62081 / 62087 / 62090** (Taminco/Eastman) — MEA Triazine equivalent
- **JadeScan 54** — MEA Triazine equivalent H2S scavenger
- **HSCAV-70** — Triazine-based H2S scavenger equivalent
- **Nipacide BK** (Clariant) — MEA Triazine biocide equivalent
- **Bioban GK** — Triazine-based biocide, functionally equivalent
- **Onyxide 200** — MEA Triazine equivalent for oilfield use
- **Busan 1060 / 1506** (Buckman) — Triazine biocide equivalent
- **KM200 / Mergal 174** — MEA Triazine equivalent products
- **Kalpur TE** — Triazine-based H2S scavenger equivalent
- **Pro3 HT** (Q2 Technologies) — MEA Triazine alternative
- **Sulfa Clear** (Lubrizol) — H2S scavenger alternative

All of these products serve similar functions as H2S scavengers or triazine-based biocides. Vasudev Chemo Pharma offers a cost-effective, direct-from-manufacturer alternative with ISO 9001:2015 certification and global export capability.
